product_information.product_name: Dr. Organic Tea Tree Shampoo 265 ML
product_information.description:
Het Product
This Tea Tree Shampoo is a purifying formula designed to refresh and balance oily hair and scalp. Ideal for oily or problem-prone scalps, it helps regulate excess oil while supporting overall scalp health. Enriched with organic tea tree oil, it provides soothing benefits that revitalise the scalp and hair. The lightweight, invigorating formula cleanses thoroughly, leaving hair soft, manageable, and refreshed. With regular use, hair feels balanced, revitalised, and naturally healthy, ready for a clean, confident look every day.
Ingredienten
Aqua, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice powder†, Ammonium lauryl sulfate, Glycerin, Caprylyl/capryl glucoside, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Sea salt (Maris sal), *MELALEUCA ALTERNIFOLIA LEAF OIL (KEY ACTIVE: Tea Tree), Mentha piperita (Peppermint) oil†, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Citric acid, Sodium phytate, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Mentha piperita oil, Limonene, Menthol, Alpha-terpinene, Pinene, Terpinolene, Beta-caryophyllene. † certified organic; 10% organic, 98% natural origin
